What We Fix
Every Roll-Up Door Problem, Solved
We diagnose and repair on-site. Most jobs are completed the same visit — no waiting for parts to be ordered across the country.
Full Door Replacement
Complete removal and installation of new roll-up doors. Proper fitment, sealing, and spring tension from the start.
TodcoWhitingReefer
Spring Repair & Adjustment
Door hard to open? Slams down? That's a spring issue. We replace broken springs and set correct tension on-site.
Spring ReplaceTension Set
Hinges, Rollers & Latches
Bent, seized, or broken hardware replaced with correct spec parts to restore smooth, safe operation.
HingesRollersLatches
Swing-to-Roll-Up Conversion
We convert swing doors to roll-up. Full track install, spring system, and complete door setup included.
Track InstallFull Setup
Panel Repair & Painting
Dented or damaged panels repaired or replaced. Painting available to match fleet colours or restore appearance.
Panel FixPaint Match
Leak & Seal Repair
Box leaks, weatherstrip failures, and track sealing issues diagnosed and repaired — cargo protected.
WeatherstripBox Leak

Pricing
Affordable Rates

We offer affordable, competitive rates. Final pricing is confirmed once we're on-site — what looks like a simple fix on the phone can turn out to be something different in person, and we'll always walk you through exactly what's needed before any work begins.

How quoting works: Give us a call or fill out the form with as much detail as you can. We'll give you an initial estimate based on what you describe — but the final price depends on Javor's assessment once he's at your location. Prices are firm — we do not compromise on quality.
Request a Quote
Tell us about your door — we'll get back to you quickly.
